thesis: Ticker choice should come from a broad compliance-filtered master universe and a daily premarket watchlist, not from a manually frozen basket.

benchmark.purpose: Primary passive benchmark for dynamic-watchlist intraday research

universe.name: dynamic_intraday_master_v1
universe.selection_rule: Broad approved liquid leaders and event names; daily watchlists are generated from premarket gap, liquidity, and context rather than from a fixed manual watchlist.

carry_forward_findings: iter_013: Fixed high-beta BSL and fixed core BSL are the current intraday controls.
2026-03-07 synthesis: We need a formal premarket planning stage and dynamic daily watchlists instead of hard-coded baskets.

candidates.hypothesis: VOO buy-and-hold remains the passive benchmark for daily and intraday comparisons.
QQQ/VOO/GLD dual momentum remains the cross-family daily control while intraday watchlist logic evolves.

Fixed high-beta gap control preserves the strongest prior specialist gap branch.
